company.what_they_do: Ishkaara is a homegrown Indian D2C fashion accessories and jewellery brand targeting Gen Z and millennial women. They sell bold, affordable, statement jewellery (earrings, rings, necklaces, bangles, body chains, waist chains, bracelets, scrunchies, sunglasses, belts, and more) primarily via their own website, and also on Myntra and Nykaa. They are known for their distinct customer experience: every order ships with a free jewellery pouch, tulsi seeds (an eco/sustainability gesture), and surprise freebies (mystery jewellery above ₹999, a 'Self-Love Organiser' above ₹1,499). They also offer free personalisation/name engraving on select products. They ship pan-India with standard and express options. Products undergo a three-level quality check before dispatch.
raw_notes: Previously known as 'Jewelishk'; rebranded to Ishkaara. Founded in 2019 by Vidhi Jain, a Delhi University student, as a campus passion project that grew from college stalls to lakhs of customers online.
Tagline: 'Accessories That Talk' — every piece designed to start conversations.
Self-described as '100% homegrown, women-led brand built on passion and purpose.'
3L+ (300,000+) happy customers claimed on homepage; About page cites 1,50,000+ — homepage figure is more recent/updated.
Sustainability: sends tulsi seeds with every order from day one; described as a core brand value.
Celebrity reach: pieces worn by Kareena Kapoor Khan, Ananya Panday, Yo Yo Honey Singh, Neha Kakkar, Sunidhi Chauhan, Urvashi Rautela.
Featured on reality shows: Bigg Boss, MTV Hustle, Saregama Pa.
Influencer network: Kusha Kapila, Shreya Jain, Shraddha Gurung, The Rebel Kid.
Available on Myntra and Nykaa in addition to own website.
Free gifts tiers: Free jewellery pouch on every order; free mystery jewellery above ₹999; free Self-Love Organiser above ₹1,499.
Free personalisation / name engraving on select products.
Three-level quality check on all products before dispatch.
Designs target Gen Z and millennials — 'no boring basics here.'
Strong customer loyalty and emotional connection evident in homepage reviews (repeat customers, gifting freebies, excitement around unboxing).
Brand ethos includes empowering young women to express themselves boldly.
Facebook page (ishkaara0) active; recent post about athletes wearing Ishkaara jewellery off-field.
